actionText: INT. STREET DOOR - NIGHT. also on screen: Character_Officer_Reynolds <IMAGE_3>, Character_OfficerHale <IMAGE_2>, Character_OfficerBriggs <IMAGE_1>. THE NARRATOR smiles. Bows them in. Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_4> still wears plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, tailored trousers; Character_Officer_Reynolds <IMAGE_3> still wears dark wool coat, civil hat, leather boots, lantern in hand Camera directive: Medium shot of Narrator smiling and bowing them in, 50mm lens, gentle track revealing open doorway. Performance: Acting intensity 6/10: Tight unnatural smile with crinkled eyes, forced gracious welcome Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, cool indigo shadows and warm amber lantern highlights

- Character_The_Narrator <IMAGE_4> [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O. CAST COUNT: exactly 4 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_OfficerBriggs, Character_OfficerHale, Character_Officer_Reynolds, Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

CONTEXT (prior clip in scene — new cast plate refs attached; match location/lighting if still valid; identity from CHARACTER VARIABLES + locked plates only):

Character_Officer_Reynolds still wears dark wool coat, civil hat, leather boots, lantern in hand Camera directive: Close-up on Officer Reynolds' stern face, 85mm lens, static hold as he declares the search.
